summary: Recent downgrades: Northland Capital Markets cut to Market Perform (Apr 27) with $260 PT. Recent upgrades: DA Davidson upgraded to Buy, raised PT $220→$375; Susquehanna raised PT $300→$375; Envision Research upgraded to Buy on agentic AI positioning.
